languages.text: "В Сектор Бионика прибыли два офицера, которые наотрез отказываются соблюдать указания медикариев и открыто требуют, чтобы их обслужили вне очереди. Что это, если не неповиновение и саботаж?"

traits.locale_text: "В Сектор Бионика прибыли два офицера, которые наотрез отказываются соблюдать указания медикариев и открыто требуют, чтобы их обслужили вне очереди. Что это, если не неповиновение и саботаж?"

languages.text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"
languages.original_text: "В Сектор Бионика прибыли два офицера, которые наотрез отказываются соблюдать указания медикариев и открыто требуют, чтобы их обслужили вне очереди. Что это, если не неповиновение и саботаж?"

traits.locale_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

"Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

"Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカに来た2人の兵士が、医務官の指示を拒否し、順番を待たずに治療を要求している。これは反逆と破壊行為ではないか」
languages.original_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'ya gelen iki subay, sıhhiye subaylarının talimatlarına uymayı kesin bir dille reddediyor ve açıkça sıra beklemeden tedavi edilmeyi talep ediyor. Bu itaatsizlik ve sabotaj değil de nedir?"
languages.original_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'ya gelen iki subay, sıhhiye subaylarının talimatlarına uymayı kesin bir dille reddediyor ve açıkça sıra beklemeden tedavi edilmeyi talep ediyor. Bu itaatsizlik ve sabotaj değil de nedir?"

languages.text: “两名前来仿生区的军官公然拒绝遵从医务官的指令，并要求为其破例优先诊治。这难道不是违抗命令与蓄意妨碍吗？”
languages.original_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: “两名前来仿生区的军官公然拒绝遵从医务官的指令，并要求为其破例优先诊治。这难道不是违抗命令与蓄意妨碍吗？”

languages.text: "Zwei Offiziere widersetzen sich im Sektor Bionica den Anweisungen der Medicae-Offiziere und verlangen offen eine bevorzugte Behandlung. Was ist das, wenn nicht Insubordination und Sabotage?"
languages.original_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: "Zwei Offiziere widersetzen sich im Sektor Bionica den Anweisungen der Medicae-Offiziere und verlangen offen eine bevorzugte Behandlung. Was ist das, wenn nicht Insubordination und Sabotage?"

languages.text: « Deux officiers venus consulter dans le secteur Bionica ont catégoriquement refusé de s'en tenir aux instructions des officiers de medicae et exigent d'être pris en charge en priorité. Un tel comportement relève de l'insubordination caractérisée, voire de la tentative de sabotage pure et simple. »
languages.original_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: « Deux officiers venus consulter dans le secteur Bionica ont catégoriquement refusé de s'en tenir aux instructions des officiers de medicae et exigent d'être pris en charge en priorité. Un tel comportement relève de l'insubordination caractérisée, voire de la tentative de sabotage pure et simple. »

languages.text: «Dos oficiales que han acudido al Sector Bionica se niegan categóricamente a acatar las órdenes de los oficiales de medicae y exigen recibir atención fuera de su turno. Si eso no es insubordinación y sabotaje, no sé qué es».
languages.original_text: "Two officers who came to the Sector Bionica flatly refuse to comply with the medicae officers' instructions and are openly demanding to be tended out of turn. What is that if not insubordination and sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: «Dos oficiales que han acudido al Sector Bionica se niegan categóricamente a acatar las órdenes de los oficiales de medicae y exigen recibir atención fuera de su turno. Si eso no es insubordinación y sabotaje, no sé qué es».
